scripts.build: set -x; echo PWD=$PWD; ls -la; echo ---_prebuilt---; ls -la _prebuilt | head; mkdir -p artifacts/dscc-website/dist/public; cp -r _prebuilt/. artifacts/dscc-website/dist/public/; echo ---OUTPUT---; ls -la artifacts/dscc-website/dist/public | head -20; echo ---ASSETS---; ls artifacts/dscc-website/dist/public/assets | head -5; echo done
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
